name: @handbook/built-by
description: Embeddable Built by Handbook footer credit

scripts.build: vite build && mkdir -p dist/v1/assets/fonts && cp dist/credit.js dist/v1/credit.js && cp assets/hb-hover-w.json dist/v1/assets/hb-hover-w.json && cp assets/fonts/FTSystemMono-Regular.woff2 dist/v1/assets/fonts/FTSystemMono-Regular.woff2 && rm dist/credit.js
